title: thelycrania alba
intro: Thelycrania alba, also known as the white milkwort, is a flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Thelycrania alba are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Thelycrania alba typically involve drying the leaves and flowers to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
